overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through a futuristic city with distinctive yellow architectural overpasses, transitioning from covered walkways through industrial back alleys and returning to open commercial streets with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under yellow overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk beneath the massive curved yellow overpass structure

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit standing against wall looking at handheld device

entered.detail: massive curved yellow architectural canopy covering the walkway
retail store with red metal facade and glowing green signage
large illuminated advertisement screen above the storefront
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive yellow architectural overpass in a futuristic city. The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk past a red metal storefront with glowing signage. A man in a suit stands near the wall on the right, and green railings line the left side separating the walkway from the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: service alley and industrial back corridor

events.description: turns right from covered walkway into narrow back service alley with industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: turning into the back alley and walking past industrial equipment and workers in safety vests

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest walking near industrial dumpster

entered.detail: massive screen mounted on wall displaying advertisement with face
white truck with yellow dump bed parked in the alley
tall dark metal storage racks with multiple levels
large red industrial equipment with ventilation grilles

segments.scene_description: Turning into a narrow service alley behind the commercial buildings. The space is enclosed by tall walls with a large digital billboard visible ahead. A dump truck is parked on the right, and workers in safety vests are present near industrial shelving and a large red generator unit.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open street area with tall futuristic skyscrapers visible in distance
yellow car drives past while crossing the open street area

agents.ego_description: exiting the back alley and crossing the open street toward the main commercial sidewalk

notable_agents.action: yellow vintage-style car driving down the street

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades visible in the distance
low red building with green trim and multiple levels

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley into a wide open street area with full sky visibility. Tall futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance, and a red industrial building sits on the left. The camera crosses the street as a yellow car passes by, with the yellow overpass structure visible again in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with billboards and parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking along the main commercial sidewalk passing large digital billboards and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: two people in matching floral jackets standing near the railing

entered.detail: large billboard displaying DELAMAIN text with vehicle advertisement
elevated pedestrian bridge structure crossing above the street
row of vintage-style cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main commercial sidewalk beneath elevated walkways. Large digital billboards including one for DELAMAIN line the street, while vintage cars are parked along the curb. Two people in matching floral jackets stand near the railing on the left, and the yellow overpass structure looms closer on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that moves from the sheltered underside of a futuristic overpass through a cramped industrial alley and back into a wide, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by gliding along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive yellow architectural structure, passing a red storefront and a man in a suit. As the camera turns away from the main path, the environment tightens into a narrow service alley enclosed by tall walls, where workers in safety vests gather around a red generator and a parked dump truck. The scene then opens abruptly into a vast street area with full sky visibility, crossing past a yellow car toward distant skyscrapers and a red industrial building. Finally, the camera moves along a main commercial sidewalk lined with vintage cars and large digital billboards, including one for Delamain, as the yellow overpass looms closer once again.
